summary: Add spec archive metadata and three reviewer-facing novel_features entries to the ClickHouse Cloud manifest.
reason: The generated manifest identified the official spec URL and run_id but did not include spec_path/spec_checksum or the novel_features entries required by the public-library publish-package verifier for new CLI submissions.
validated_outcome: spec.json SHA-256 is recorded in .printing-press.json, and novel_features cover service inventory, ClickPipes operations, and usage/observability workflows. The checksum reflects the archived spec after secret-scan-safe example redaction.
